siteConfig.title: Site Config
siteConfig.description: Configure your site identity, branding, homepage layout, blog sidebars, navigation, and feature flags.

aiTransparency.title: AI transparency
aiTransparency.description: Show an AI usage disclosure on posts and pages. Turn this on only if you use AI to help draft or write content — when off, no AI disclosure is shown anywhere on the site.
aiTransparency.label: Show AI usage disclosure
aiTransparency.hint: When enabled, every post and page shows its AI usage (text/code level and tools) at the bottom.

aiTransparencyUrl.label: “Learn more” link
aiTransparencyUrl.hint: Where the “Learn more about AI usage” link points. Defaults to /ai; use any path (e.g. /about/ai) or full URL.

identity.title: Identity
identity.saved: Identity saved successfully. Refresh your site to see changes.

name.label: Name
name.hint: The person's name, shown in the h-card, hero, and author cards. For the site/brand title, use Site title below.

avatar.label: Avatar URL
avatar.hint: URL of your profile photo for the h-card

bio.label: Short bio
bio.hint: One-paragraph bio for sidebars and h-card

url.label: URL
url.hint: Your canonical site URL (used as rel=me)

keyUrl.label: PGP key
keyUrl.hint: URL of your public PGP key (optional, used for IndieAuth/rel=key)

tags.label: Tags
tags.hint: Comma-separated h-card categories (e.g. indieweb, devops, brussels)

social.description: Profiles linked from the h-card. Drag to reorder.

siteName.label: Site title
siteName.hint: Shown in the site header, browser tab, and link previews. Leave blank to use your Name above (for single-author sites where the brand is the person).

branding.title: Branding
branding.description: Pick a palette, choose your accent, and override any color role. Defaults derive from the palette you choose.

groups.paletteDesc: Pick the base neutral, the accent hue, and how the site responds to OS color-scheme preference.
groups.textDesc: Colors for headings, body text, and secondary text.
groups.interactionDesc: Colors for links, calls-to-action, and the keyboard focus ring.
groups.structureDesc: Colors for card surfaces and borders.
groups.advancedDesc: Most sites should leave these alone — the palette already derives them. Override only if you have a strong reason.

branding.surfacePresetHint: Pick a base palette. Warm Stone is cream/brown, Clay is terracotta/rose, Stone is a pure gray, Cool Slate is blue-gray, Sage is green-tinted. Custom lets you define all 11 tones manually.
branding.surfaceCustomHint: 11 tones from lightest (50) to darkest (950). Applied only when the surface preset above is set to Custom.
branding.accentBaseHint: The primary brand hue. We derive an 11-shade scale (used for links, calls-to-action, and the focus ring) from this single color.
branding.modeHint: Light always serves the light palette. Dark always serves dark. Auto follows the visitor's OS preference, and lets them override via the page toggle.

roles.bgHint: The color behind everything. Defaults to the lightest (or darkest) surface tone.
roles.fgHint: Default text color for paragraphs and body content.
roles.fgMutedHint: Used for metadata, captions, timestamps, and secondary labels.
roles.heading: Heading
roles.headingHint: Used for page titles and section headers (h1-h6).
roles.linkHint: Color of links in body content. Excludes navigation buttons and primary calls-to-action.
roles.actionHint: Primary call-to-action backgrounds (Post, Save, Submit, Subscribe).
roles.actionFgHint: Text color inside Action-colored buttons. Should pass contrast against the Action color.
roles.focusHint: Visual focus indicator for keyboard navigation. Must be visible on both light and dark backgrounds.
roles.surfaceHint: Background of cards, panels, sidebars, and other content areas that sit on top of the page background.
roles.borderHint: Dividers and outlines for cards, form fields, and table cells.

history.title: Saved history
history.desc: Up to the 10 most recent branding states. Revert restores a snapshot — the current state is saved first so you can undo.

contrast.failHint: These role pairs have too little contrast to be legible. Saving is blocked until they are fixed.
contrast.warnHint: These pairs barely meet legibility thresholds — consider increasing contrast for visitors with low vision.

design.title: Design
design.description: Compose your site's surfaces from blocks — drafts stay private until you publish.

pages.empty: No pages yet. Create one below.
pages.confirmDelete: Delete this page? It will be removed from your site on the next publish.

editor.title: Homepage design
editor.description: Arrange the blocks that make up your homepage. Changes are saved as a draft until you publish.
editor.listingDescription: Arrange the blocks in your blog listing sidebar. Changes are saved as a draft until you publish.
editor.posttypeDescription: Arrange the blocks in your post sidebar. Changes are saved as a draft until you publish.
editor.pagesDescription: Arrange the blocks that make up this page. Changes are saved as a draft until you publish.

zones.empty: No blocks in this zone yet.

confirms.remove: Remove “{{label}}” from your {{{surface}}}? You can undo right after.
confirms.discard: Discard the draft and return to the published {{{surface}}}?

recipes.title: Quick-start recipes
recipes.intro: Start from a ready-made layout. Applying a recipe replaces your current draft.
recipes.confirmReplace: Applying a recipe replaces your current draft. Continue?

empty.explainer: No {{{surface}}} composition exists yet. Pick a recipe below to create one — you'll be able to rearrange everything afterwards.

custom.notice: This {{{surface}}} uses a custom hand-built layout that the visual editor can't safely edit.
custom.hint: The composition is read-only here. Apply a recipe from an empty state or edit the stored tree directly to make changes.

flash.saved: Block settings saved to the draft.
flash.recipe: Recipe applied — the draft now uses the new layout.
flash.sidebarMoved: {{count}} sidebar block(s) moved to the main column.
flash.undoUnavailable: Undo isn't available for this removal.

errors.placement: That block can't be placed in that zone.
errors.duplicate: That block is already on the {{{surface}}} and can only appear once.
errors.hero-occupied: The hero slot is already occupied.
errors.no-composition: No {{{surface}}} composition exists yet — apply a recipe first.
errors.custom-tree: This {{{surface}}} uses a custom layout and is read-only in the editor.
errors.not-found: That block no longer exists — the page may be out of date.
errors.undo-invalid: This undo link is no longer valid.
errors.publish-invalid: The draft failed validation and was not published.
errors.conflict: The draft changed while publishing — try again.
errors.config-invalid: Some settings are invalid — fix the highlighted fields below.

previewPane.empty: No preview yet — choose “Update preview” to build one.
previewPane.requested: Preview update requested — the site is rebuilding. Reload this page in a moment to refresh the preview.
previewPane.slow: This is taking longer than usual — the preview will appear once the build finishes. Use “Reload preview” to check again.

buildStatus.building: Rebuilding — usually ~{{seconds}}s on this site. Your current site stays online.
buildStatus.buildingUnknown: Rebuilding — your current site stays online.
buildStatus.failed: Build failed — your live site is unchanged.
buildStatus.stuck: This is taking longer than usual. Publishing again rewrites the homepage and usually unblocks a stalled build.
buildStatus.unknown: Build status unavailable — your live site is unchanged.
buildStatus.reloadNote: Reload this page to update the build status.

homepage.title: Homepage
homepage.description: Configure your homepage layout, sections, sidebar widgets, and footer.
homepage.saved: Configuration saved successfully. Refresh your homepage to see changes.

presets.title: Quick Start
presets.description: Choose a preset to quickly configure your homepage. You can customize it further below.

hero.title: Hero Section
hero.enabled: Show hero section with author info

ctaText.label: “Read more” link text
ctaText.hint: Text for the call-to-action shown after the site description (e.g. “Read more”, “À propos”, “En savoir plus”).

ctaUrl.label: “Read more” link target
ctaUrl.hint: Where the hero “read more” link points. Defaults to /about; use any path (e.g. /apropos) or a full URL.

sections.title: Content Sections
sections.description: Add and arrange sections that appear in the main content area.
sections.empty: No sections configured. Add sections from the picker below.

sidebar.title: Sidebar Widgets
sidebar.description: Configure widgets that appear in the sidebar (only visible with two-column layout).
sidebar.empty: No widgets configured. Add widgets from the picker below.

footer.title: Footer (3-column)
footer.description: A responsive 3-column area below the main content — add up to 3 blocks (one per column). Ideal for webrings, links, or custom content.

blog.title: Blog Layout
blog.listingMoved: The blog listing sidebar is now edited in Design → Listing, where it can be composed visually and shared across all listing pages.

blogListingSidebar.title: Blog Listing Sidebar
blogListingSidebar.description: Configure widgets that appear in the sidebar on blog listing pages (/blog/, /notes/, /articles/...). Leave empty to use default widgets.
blogListingSidebar.empty: No widgets configured — using default sidebar.

blogPostSidebar.title: Blog Post Sidebar
blogPostSidebar.description: Configure widgets that appear in the sidebar on individual post pages. Leave empty to use default widgets.
blogPostSidebar.empty: No widgets configured — using default sidebar.

navigation.title: Navigation
navigation.description: Site header menu links. Leave empty rows blank — they will be ignored on save.
